description_long: This object consists of three large, cylindrical metal barrels with slightly convex tops and bottoms, stacked in a triangular arrangement. The barrels have a weathered, industrial appearance with a dark, bluish-gray patina and subtle rust stains, suggesting prolonged outdoor exposure. Each barrel features a circular cap or bung on the top surface, used for filling or emptying contents. The barrels are seamless with horizontal reinforcing ribs, typical of oil drums or chemical storage containers. The metal surfaces are matte with some reflective highlights, indicating a hard, durable material. The overall structure is robust and utilitarian, suitable for storing liquids or bulk materials in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A group of three weathered, cylindrical metal barrels with caps, arranged in a triangular stack. The barrels have a dark, bluish-gray finish and are reinforced with horizontal ribs.
description_view_0: Two barrels are stacked vertically, showing the side profile and the circular caps on top.
description_view_1: Three barrels are arranged in a triangular formation, with one on top and two at the base, all caps visible.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, showing the vertical stack of two barrels from the opposite side, with caps visible.
description_view_3: Triangular arrangement of three barrels, with the top barrel centered and the two base barrels slightly apart.
